title: iris tarhunensis
intro: Iris tarhunensis, also known as the Tarhun iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Iris tarhunensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
